ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company's stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Trading day of the stock price data */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the index */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "index_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the company in the index */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the index */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date the company was removed from the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the index price data */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the index */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value from the previous period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the index */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Trading day of the index price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid by the company */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity of the company */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company mentioned in the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., earnings report, product launch, shareholder meeting) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the trading session opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the trading session closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "pre_market_open" TEXT /* Pre-market open time */,
  "pre_market_close" TEXT /* Pre-market close time */,
  "post_market_open" TEXT /* Post-market open time */,
  "post_market_close" TEXT /* Post-market close time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS, push notifications) */,
  "default_view" TEXT /* Default view for the user (e.g., dashboard, watchlist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, earnings) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, real-time) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the alert (e.g., greater than, less than, equal to) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the transaction is for */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid on the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the holding was last updated */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss on the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the watchlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the tax document (e.g., W-2, 1099) */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Tax year of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the tax document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Payable date */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mergers_acquisitions" (
  "merger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merger or acquisition */,
  "acquiring_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the acquiring company */,
  "target_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target company */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date of the announcement */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of the completion */,
  "deal_value" REAL /* Deal value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mergers_acquisitions_acquiring_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mergers_acquisitions_target_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
